entries.name: sports-registry-reconcile-references
entries.purpose: Nightly 04:15 UTC. Scans every table in `config('sports_registry.reconciler.reference_tables')` for dangling sport_key / discipline_key / position_key references. Reports drift + fires SportPrefixResolutionFailed per unresolved row. Feeds `stackra.sports_registry.reference_drift.count` gauge.

entries.name: sports-registry-purge-archived
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 05:30 UTC. Hard-delete tenant custom rows past their 730-day deactivation retention window IF zero downstream references remain. Platform-seeded rows are never touched.

entries.name: sports-registry-metrics-snapshot
entries.purpose: Hourly. Compute `stackra.sports_registry.active.count` per (entity_kind, is_platform_seeded) + `stackra.sports_registry.per_tenant_custom.count` histogram + `stackra.sports_registry.purge_pending.count`. Publishes to the OpenTelemetry endpoint.

entries.name: sports-registry-cache-warm-catalog
entries.purpose: Daily 06:00 UTC. Re-populates `sports:list:platform` + top-N `sports:full:{id}` cache keys. Cheap idempotent task — mostly a safety net in case a Redis flush wiped the caches overnight.

entries.name: sports-registry-drift-alert-summary
entries.purpose: Daily 09:00 UTC. Aggregates the SportPrefixResolutionFailed events from the last 24h into a single ops summary email — batches individual per-row notifications so ops doesn't get flooded. Sends only when count > 0.
